ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the airline operating the flight */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source city of the flight */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination city of the flight */,
  "total_stops" INTEGER /* Number of stops in the flight */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the flight */,
  "journey_day" INTEGER /* Day of the journey */,
  "journey_month" INTEGER /* Month of the journey */,
  "dep_hour" INTEGER /* Hour of departure */,
  "dep_min" INTEGER /* Minute of departure */,
  "arrival_hour" INTEGER /* Hour of arrival */,
  "arrival_min" INTEGER /* Minute of arrival */,
  "duration_hours" INTEGER /* Total duration in hours */,
  "duration_mins" INTEGER /* Total duration in minutes */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the flight within the airline */,
  "flight_status" TEXT /* Current status of the flight */,
  "aircraft_model" TEXT /* Model of the aircraft used for the flight */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the route the flight is taking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flight record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flight record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_destination_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the airline's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the airline's official website */,
  "frequent_flyer_program" TEXT /* Name of the airline's frequent flyer program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the airline record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the airline record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the city */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source city */,
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the destination city */,
  "route_distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "route_duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of the route */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the flight */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the price was recorded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pricing record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the pricing record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_pricing_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "dep_datetime" TEXT /* Scheduled departure datetime */,
  "arr_datetime" TEXT /* Scheduled arrival datetime */,
  "schedule_type" TEXT /* Type of schedule */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the flight */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_schedules_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_durations" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each duration record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "total_duration" TEXT /* Total duration of the flight */,
  "stopover_duration" TEXT /* Duration of stopovers */,
  "num_stops" INTEGER /* Number of stops */,
  "ground_time" TEXT /* Time the aircraft spends on the ground */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the duration record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the duration record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_durations_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flight */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers on the flight */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of passengers */,
  "most_common_origin" TEXT /* Most common origin city */,
  "most_common_destination" TEXT /* Most common destination city */,
  "passenger_gender_ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of male to female passengers */,
  "passenger_loyalty_status" TEXT /* Most common loyalty status of passengers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_statistics_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operations, marketing, finance) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
